headline: A Key Cybersecurity CEO Says ‘We Must Fight AI With AI’ as Software Stocks Keep Selling Off. Are We Missing the Bigger Picture With Cyber Stocks?
summary: Palo Alto Networks CEO Nikesh Arora believes cybersecurity is only growing in importance as AI advancements continue.

headline: Fortinet Investigation Initiated: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC Investigates the Officers and Directors of Fortinet Inc. - FTNT
summary: Former Attorney General of Louisiana, Charles C. Foti, Jr., Esq., a partner at the law firm of Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC , announces that KSF has commenced an investigation into Fortinet Inc. .On...
